data.body:
COMPLETED. Documented session_log across the agent-facing docs, cross-checked against the shipped stories (add5/7657/1368/e2e3/e7e4):
- CLAUDE.md: added recent_session_logs to Reads and log_session to Writes; new '## Session logs' section (gate/lifecycle-exempt, searchable-but-hidden-from-list, graph/health-excluded, non-blocking-links-only, Jira-excluded, title-summary convention 'not enforced', + the capture helper + recent-logs usage across lib/CLI/MCP); added a session_log row to the ticket-type matrix noting gate exemption.
- docs/architecture.md: documented the reduce_all_tickets(exclude_session_logs=…) compile-exclusion seam on the Reducer bullet, and the Graph exclusion (with deps-on-a-log-still-resolves note).
- docs/event-schema.md: CREATE row now lists the valid ticket_type enum incl. session_log + its rules; LINK row notes session_log refuses blocks/depends_on but allows relates_to/discovered_from.
- docs/output-schemas.md: added session-logs to the always-JSON reads, the profile line, and the ticket_state/ticket_state_llm rows.

No test parses these docs for assertions; docs-only change.
